signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: Demand was up 7% in Q2... August up 12%... outperforming the industry by 15 to 25 points — no trade-down language present; RH's affluent customer base shows no stress signals in this transcript.
signal_evidence.capex_direction: Our plan to expand the RH brand globally, address new markets locally, and transform our North American Galleries represents a multi-billion-dollar opportunity — Newport Beach, Raleigh, Montecito openings confirmed, Paris/London/Milan pipeline accelerating.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: Product margins inflecting positive despite operating in the most challenging housing market in three decades — positive inflection confirmed but no explicit pricing increase disclosed; pricing errors on contemporary assortment acknowledged.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: We couldn't be more excited... we have a lot of confidence, we have a lot of data... I've never seen anything like that in my career — markedly more confident tone versus prior quarters where the inflection was described as anticipated but not yet arrived.
